title: Update /up endpoint — JSON format response
description:
The `/up` endpoint already returns JSON, but the current response body contains a typo (`"I'm wokring"`). This sub-task ensures the JSON format is correct, consistent, and covered by tests.

Expected response body:
```json
{ "status": "ok", "message": "Service is up and running" }
```

Parent ticket: https://linear.app/axbots/issue/TES-18/update-up-endpoint
scope: Ensure the /up endpoint returns a well-formed, typo-free JSON body when the JSON format is requested.
acceptance_criteria: GET /up with Accept: application/json returns HTTP 200
Response body is valid JSON with a status/message field indicating the service is up
No typos in the response message
Existing JSON behaviour is not broken for clients that omit an Accept header
relation_to_original: Covers the JSON format requirement from the parent ticket and fixes the pre-existing typo in the current response.
